name: Match It: Picture Merge Puzzle VR

reviews.review_description:
I like this game very much. But level 46 is difficult to complete. The top pieces are difficult to see, because that buttons are in the way…
Also not possible to play with left hand.  
If those are solved, gonna change it to 5⭐️

developer_response.body:
In version 1.0.5, we have made several improvements based on player feedback:

Fixed UI visibility issues
Adjusted the difficulty curve
Increased level rewards
Added more time to help players solve puzzles comfortably
Added support for both left and right controllers

We are also continuing to improve level balance, including difficult levels like level 46.

For more questions, feedback, or suggestions, you can join our Discord community:
Server name: gammayinteractive
https://discord.gg/bPnkt8rz

Thank you again for playing and sharing your feedback!
